# leadingTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text provider for the gauge’s leading text.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKTextProvider?> @objc final var leadingTextProvider: CLKTextProvider? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The template supports multicolored text from this text provider.

## Accessing the Content

- **label**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
- **trailingTextProvider**: The text provider for the gauge’s trailing text.
